# AkovoLabs Speedtest

Free internet speed test tool by AkovoLabs. Measure your download speed, upload speed, and latency with accurate results.

- [Home](https://speedtest.akovolabs.co.za/)
- [Login](https://speedtest.akovolabs.co.za/login)
- [Register](https://speedtest.akovolabs.co.za/register)
- [About](https://speedtest.akovolabs.co.za/about)
- [Services](https://speedtest.akovolabs.co.za/services)
- [Download Android](https://speedtest.akovolabs.co.za/download-android)
- [Download iOS](https://speedtest.akovolabs.co.za/download-ios)
